title: Kindar the Invulnerable
writer: Alessandro Ferraù, Roberto Gianviti, Luciano Trasatti
actors: Mark Forest, Mimmo Palmara, Rosalba Neri
plot: An evil desert bandit kidnaps the son of a sultan and raises him as his own. It turns out that the son has magic powers and is invincible. Years later, as a young man, he falls in love with a woman and is preparing to raid a villa...
